hero.kicker: The wild pulse of Costa Rica
hero.lead: Discover the soul of the rainforest through bespoke expeditions designed for the modern explorer.

main.alt: Poas Volcano active crater with turquoise acid lake and rising steam

inset1.alt: Vibrant Scarlet Macaws perched in the Costa Rican canopy

inset2.alt: Lush tropical waterfall surrounded by cloud forest at La Paz Waterfall Gardens

primary.title: Poas Volcano & La Paz Waterfall Gardens
primary.description: Wander through mystical cloud forests to reach active craters, followed by an immersive walk through spectacular cascading waterfalls.

images.alt: Poas Volcano active crater with turquoise acid lake and rising steam
Cascading waterfalls surrounded by lush cloud forest at La Paz Waterfall Gardens

secondary.title: Poas Volcano & Doka Estate
secondary.description: Discover the rich volcanic soil's influence on coffee production, from bean to cup, complemented by vibrant butterfly gardens.
secondary.imageAlt: Coffee beans drying on a sun-drenched wooden platform at a Costa Rican estate

cards.title: Tour Poas, Grecia & Sarchi
cards.description: Visit the iconic metal church of Grecia and witness the artistry of vibrant, hand-painted oxcarts in Sarchi, the heart of Costa Rican craftsmanship.

cards.title: Arenal Volcano & Hot Springs
cards.description: A journey to the northern lowlands for foothills hiking and thermal relaxation.
cards.imageAlt: Arenal Volcano behind tropical palms with steam rising from natural hot springs

wildlife.title: Wildlife & Water
wildlife.lead: From the vibrant plumage of the Scarlet Macaw to the ancient giants of the Tárcoles River, experience the primal beauty of Costa Rica's coast and waterways.

items.title: Carara National Park & Crocodile Safari
items.description: A biological crossroads where primary and secondary forests meet the massive river crocodiles.

items.title: Tortuga Island by Calypso Cruises
items.description: White sands, turquoise waters, and a catamaran feast within the Gulf of Nicoya.

wildlife.imageAlt: Scarlet Macaws perched on a tropical branch in Carara National Park
wildlife.insetImageAlt: Catamaran sailing through turquoise waters toward Tortuga Island

items.title: San Luis Canopy Tour
items.description: Cloud forest zip-lining and the unique 'Elevator' lift experience.
items.imageAlt: Zip-line view above a mist-shrouded Costa Rican cloud forest canopy

items.title: Adventure Combo (3 in 1)
items.description: Horseback riding, canopy zip-lines, and Sarapiquí river rafting.
items.imageAlt: White-water rafting group navigating rapids on the Sarapiquí River

evening.title: Chocolate Tour & Night Walk at La Tirimbina
evening.description: As the sun dips below the horizon, the rainforest transforms. Unveil the ancient secrets of cacao before venturing into the darkness to discover the creatures that come alive only after twilight.
evening.imageAlt: A silver bowl filled with roasted cacao beans against a lush green tropical backdrop
